items.title: Employee login
items.steps: Open the login page and sign in with a seeded employee account (e.g. emp_001).
items.expected: Redirected to the employee dashboard with course cards.

items.title: Role gate blocks employees
items.steps: While logged in as an employee, open /manager-dashboard directly via the URL bar.
items.expected: Bounced back to the dashboard with an 'access denied' toast.

items.title: Logout
items.steps: Use the sidebar account card's Log out button, then try opening any page.
items.expected: Returned to the login page; protected pages redirect to /login.

items.title: Course cards render
items.steps: On the dashboard Courses tab, review the lesson cards and the inline expand toggle.
items.expected: Cards show correct progress; pagination appears past 5 cards.

items.title: Paths tab
items.steps: Switch to the Paths tab on the dashboard.
items.expected: Enrolled paths are listed with overall progress.

items.title: Learning path detail
items.steps: Open Learning Path from the sidebar.
items.expected: Courses and lessons are listed in order with completion states.

items.title: Lesson content
items.steps: Open a lesson from the dashboard.
items.expected: Lesson content renders (headings, lists, key points); Start quiz button is present.

items.title: Take a lesson quiz
items.steps: Start a lesson quiz and answer a few questions.
items.expected: Inline feedback appears after each answer; progress advances.

items.title: Wrong-answer reflection
items.steps: Deliberately answer one question wrong.
items.expected: A reflection prompt appears explaining the concept before moving on.

items.title: Finish a quiz
items.steps: Complete the quiz to the results screen.
items.expected: Score shown with pass/fail and the correct next action (continue, gap review, or remedial course).

items.title: Enroll from the catalog
items.steps: Open Catalog and enroll in a published path.
items.expected: Enrollment is confirmed and the path appears on the dashboard's Paths tab.

items.title: Coach chat replies
items.steps: Open the chat coach and ask a question about your learning path or progress.
items.expected: Typing indicator while waiting; a relevant reply renders in the thread.

items.title: Team dashboard KPIs
items.steps: Log in as the manager and open Team Dashboards.
items.expected: KPI cards and the per-report table populate with team data.

items.title: Excel report export
items.steps: Press the export button on the manager dashboard.
items.expected: An .xlsx file downloads and opens with formatted team data.

items.title: Knowledge vault upload
items.steps: Upload a document in the Knowledge Vault and watch the ingestion job.
items.expected: The job completes; conflicts with existing documents are flagged for review.

items.title: Learning materials & versions
items.steps: Open Learning Materials; check the document list and a document's version history.
items.expected: Documents are listed; version history shows snapshots with restore available.

items.title: Edit a learning path
items.steps: Open a path in the editor, edit a lesson, check the markdown preview, save, reload.
items.expected: The edit persists after reload; preview matches the rendered lesson.

items.title: Project creation is manager-only
items.steps: As the manager, open Team Documentation and create a new project. Then log in as an employee and confirm no 'New Project' control is offered.
items.expected: The manager's project is created and listed; the employee view has no way to create or delete a project but can still open existing ones.

items.title: Link Knowledge Vault sources & add a page
items.steps: Open a project, use 'Manage Sources' to check a couple of Knowledge Vault uploads, then add a page via the vault or AI-draft mode.
items.expected: Checked sources are saved and pre-checked on reopen; the new page renders with the correct origin badge.

items.title: Documentation Master full synthesis
items.steps: With sources linked (TDOC-02), press 'Generate Full Documentation' and wait for it to finish.
items.expected: A multi-page doc set is written (overview, glossary, etc. as applicable) grounded in the linked sources, each page badged as synthesized by Documentation Master; re-running replaces only those pages.

items.title: Agent console
items.steps: Log in as the developer and open the Agent Console; edit and save a prompt template.
items.expected: The agent graph and config sections load; the template edit saves and persists.

items.title: Documentation system
items.steps: Open Documentation; browse pages; edit-save a page; download TXT and PDF.
items.expected: The tree renders, markdown displays, the save persists, both downloads work.

items.title: Submit a support ticket
items.steps: As an employee, submit a ticket from the Support form.
items.expected: The ticket appears under 'My tickets' with status New.

items.title: Triage a ticket
items.steps: As the developer, open the Support Console; set status/priority and add a work note.
items.expected: Changes appear in the ticket's activity timeline and the reporter sees the update.

items.title: Dark mode
items.steps: Toggle dark mode from the sidebar and browse several pages.
items.expected: All pages render correctly in dark mode; the choice persists on reload.

items.title: Sidebar collapse & active state
items.steps: Collapse the sidebar and navigate between pages.
items.expected: The collapsed state persists across pages; the active nav item is highlighted.
